race_meta.race_name: Johnny Burke's Cheltenham Blog At CopyBet Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model correctly identified hudson de grugy (ranked 1st with 28.0% predicted probability). Strong analytical framework.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Hudson De Grugy > Lady In The Park, but actual result was Hudson De Grugy > Super Citizen. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Hudson De Grugy had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.8%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
